meanings.definition: from that place or from there
examples: flew to Helsinki and thence to Moscow

meanings.definition: from that circumstance or source; - W.V.Quine
examples: atomic formulas and all compounds thence constructible
public interest and a policy deriving therefrom

meanings.definition: (used to introduce a logical conclusion) from that fact or reason or as a result
examples: the eggs were fresh and hence satisfactory
we were young and thence optimistic
it is late and thus we must go
the witness is biased and so cannot be trusted
